{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Frontend Developer",
  "description": "Gate84 is a technology company building the digital infrastructure for a functional society. We aim to bridge the gap between real-world problems and technical solutions by creating a platform where verified experts can propose practical, peer-reviewed solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Frontend Developer

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Design and develop high-performance, scalable web applications using React.js.
	Connect the frontend to complex RESTful APIs, handling asynchronous data, loading states, and error catching.
	Establish and maintain a reusable UI component library system.
	Collaborate with designers, backend developers, and product managers to translate user needs and business goals into functional and engaging web applications.
	Identify and address performance bottlenecks to ensure smooth and responsive user experiences.
	Conduct unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing to ensure application reliability.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Computer Science or a related field.
	2+ years of experience building applications with React.js and Next.js.
	Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript and TypeScript.
	Experience with state management libraries such as Redux, MobX, etc.
	Proficiency with software engineering best practices including writing production quality code, agile development, version control.


Benefits and opportunities


	Salary: N300,000 - N400,000 monthly.
	Monthly transport allowance
	HMO Coverage
	Gym membership
	Opportunity to grow and lead a team.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and links of their LinkedIn/portfolio/projects to:&nbsp;joel@gate84.io&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Frontend Developer Job at Gate84




        
    

        
        Gate84 is a technology company building the digital infrastructure for a functional society. We aim to bridge the gap between real-world problems and technical solutions by creating a platform where verified experts can propose practical, peer-reviewed solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Frontend Developer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Design and develop high-performance, scalable web applications using React.js.
	Connect the frontend to complex RESTful APIs, handling asynchronous data, loading states, and error catching.
	Establish and maintain a reusable UI component library system.
	Collaborate with designers, backend developers, and product managers to translate user needs and business goals into functional and engaging web applications.
	Identify and address performance bottlenecks to ensure smooth and responsive user experiences.
	Conduct unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing to ensure application reliability.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or a related field.
	2+ years of experience building applications with React.js and Next.js.
	Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript and TypeScript.
	Experience with state management libraries such as Redux, MobX, etc.
	Proficiency with software engineering best practices including writing production quality code, agile development, version control.


Benefits and opportunities


	Salary: N300,000 - N400,000 monthly.
	Monthly transport allowance
	HMO Coverage
	Gym membership
	Opportunity to grow and lead a team.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and links of their LinkedIn/portfolio/projects to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Content and Social Media Specialist",
  "description": "ALX Africa, a non-profit organisation under the ALX Foundation, is dedicated to unlocking the potential of Africa&#39;s digital future. Formerly part of Sand Tech Holdings, we&#39;ve embarked on an independent journey to provide world-class tech skills training and career acceleration programmes. Our mission is to bridge the digital divide, upskill and re-skill talent, and create a generation of innovative leaders. By 2030, we aim to empower 2 million Africans to secure sustainable tech careers.&nbsp;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Content and Social Media Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos, Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary&nbsp;


	The Content &amp; Social Media Specialist is responsible for shaping how ALX Nigeria communicates its value to the market through compelling storytelling and engaging digital content.
	This role leads the development and distribution of content that educates prospective learners, builds trust in the ALX brand, and supports learner acquisition campaigns.&nbsp;
	Working closely with the Growth Specialist and Performance Marketing Specialist, the Content &amp; Social Media Specialist ensures that ALX programmes, learner stories, and outcomes are communicated clearly and compellingly across digital platforms.
	The role combines content strategy, storytelling, social media distribution, and creator community development to strengthen ALX Nigeria&rsquo;s digital presence and expand its reach across Nigeria&rsquo;s technology and youth ecosystem.&nbsp;
	The ideal candidate understands how content drives demand generation and can translate complex educational offerings into clear, relatable narratives that inspire action.
	Success in this role requires both creativity and discipline; someone who can consistently produce engaging content while also creating moments that capture national attention and drive organic amplification.


Specific Responsibilities
Content Strategy and Copywriting:


	Develop and execute a content strategy that clearly communicates the value of ALX programmes and inspires prospective learners to take action. ? Craft compelling copy for: Social media posts, Marketing campaigns, Landing pages, Community engagement initiatives and Learner and alumni storytelling features&nbsp;
	Translate complex programme offerings into clear, relatable narratives that resonate with young professionals and aspiring tech learners. Ensure content consistently reinforces ALX Nigeria&rsquo;s positioning around digital skills, career transformation, and the future of work.&nbsp;


Content Creation and Mobile Production:


	Produce engaging short-form video content using mobile devices, capturing authentic learner stories, programme highlights, and community experiences.&nbsp;
	Maintain a consistent pipeline of video testimonials featuring learners, alumni, and instructors that showcase programme outcomes and career transformation.&nbsp;
	Edit video content using mobile editing tools to enable rapid content production and distribution.&nbsp;
	Prioritise formats that drive organic reach and engagement, particularly short-form video and authentic storytelling.&nbsp;
	Maintain a consistent flow of high-quality visual and written content across social platforms.&nbsp;


Social Media Management:


	Manage ALX Nigeria&rsquo;s social media presence across key platforms, including LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, X (Twitter), and YouTube&nbsp;
	Develop and maintain a structured content calendar aligned with marketing campaigns, programme launches, and community initiatives.
	Monitor social media conversations and engage with audiences in ways that strengthen credibility and trust.&nbsp;
	Ensure consistent messaging, tone, and storytelling across all social platforms.&nbsp;
	Identify and expand ALX Nigeria&rsquo;s presence into emerging or underutilised platforms where relevant audiences are active (e.g., Reddit, Pinterest, niche community forums), establishing credibility and meaningful engagement in new digital spaces.&nbsp;


Campaign Support:


	Collaborate closely with the Performance Marketing Specialist to develop messaging and creative assets that support marketing campaigns.&nbsp;
	Ensure campaign narratives align with growth objectives and audience needs.&nbsp;
	Continuously refine messaging based on campaign performance insights and audience feedback.&nbsp;


Content Production Coordination:


	Work closely with the Video Editor / Graphics Design Associate to produce high-quality visual and video content.&nbsp;
	Coordinate content production pipelines to ensure a steady flow of creative assets for marketing campaigns and social media.&nbsp;
	Maintain clear creative briefs and content planning processes to support efficient execution.&nbsp;


Audience Insights and Content Optimisation:


	Monitor audience engagement and content performance to understand what messaging resonates most strongly with prospective learners.&nbsp;
	Track and analyse metrics such as:&nbsp;
	
		Engagement rates&nbsp;
		Reach and impressions&nbsp;
	
	
	Follower growth&nbsp;
	Video completion rates
	Use insights to continuously refine content strategy and storytelling effectiveness.&nbsp;


Creator Community and Ambassador Networks:


	Build and nurture a community of creators who help tell and amplify the ALX story. This includes engaging: Learners, Alumni, Ambassadors, Community leaders &amp; Student advocates&nbsp;
	Develop structured creator programmes that encourage consistent storytelling around ALX programmes, learner journeys, and career outcomes.&nbsp;
	Provide guidance, prompts, and creative direction to help creators produce authentic content aligned with ALX messaging.&nbsp;
	Design repeatable formats for creator-led storytelling, including: Testimonial videos, Day-in-the-life content, Career transition stories, Programme highlights &amp; Community challenges&nbsp;
	Encourage learners and alumni to produce authentic content that expands ALX&rsquo;s visibility through peer-to-peer storytelling.&nbsp;
	Develop creator-led campaigns that increase organic reach and strengthen community participation.&nbsp;


High-Impact and Viral Content:


	Create content designed for shareability and organic amplification. ? Identify cultural moments, industry conversations, and social trends where ALX can participate authentically.&nbsp;
	Experiment with storytelling formats capable of generating high-impact reach and viral engagement.&nbsp;
	Develop content campaigns that capture attention across Nigeria&rsquo;s youth, technology, and career communities&nbsp;


Skill Requirements
Essential:


	5&ndash;7 years of experience in content marketing, social media strategy, or digital storytelling
	Strong copywriting ability with a clear and persuasive narrative style&nbsp;
	Demonstrated experience producing short-form video content&nbsp;
	Basic graphic design ability using Canva or similar tools.&nbsp;
	Strong understanding of modern social media platforms and content formats
	Familiarity with the Nigerian social media landscape across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube.&nbsp;
	Experience with email marketing or CRM-integrated content campaigns.
	Experience creating content that supports marketing and growth objectives
	Ability to combine creativity with strategic thinking&nbsp;
	Adaptability: Comfort operating in an environment where priorities shift, products evolve, and the playbook is still being written. Someone who finds ambiguity energising rather than paralysing.
	Collaborative Instinct: A natural inclination to share context, loop in the right people, and build on others&#39; work rather than operating in isolation. Especially important in a small team where information hoarding slows everything down.&nbsp;

Content and Social Media Specialist Job at ALX Africa




        
    

        
        ALX Africa, a non-profit organisation under the ALX Foundation, is dedicated to unlocking the potential of Africa's digital future. Formerly part of Sand Tech Holdings, we've embarked on an independent journey to provide world-class tech skills training and career acceleration programmes. Our mission is to bridge the digital divide, upskill and re-skill talent, and create a generation of innovative leaders. By 2030, we aim to empower 2 million Africans to secure sustainable tech careers. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content and Social Media Specialist

Job Location: Lagos, Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Content & Social Media Specialist is responsible for shaping how ALX Nigeria communicates its value to the market through compelling storytelling and engaging digital content.
	This role leads the development and distribution of content that educates prospective learners, builds trust in the ALX brand, and supports learner acquisition campaigns. 
	Working closely with the Growth Specialist and Performance Marketing Specialist, the Content & Social Media Specialist ensures that ALX programmes, learner stories, and outcomes are communicated clearly and compellingly across digital platforms.
	The role combines content strategy, storytelling, social media distribution, and creator community development to strengthen ALX Nigeria’s digital presence and expand its reach across Nigeria’s technology and youth ecosystem. 
	The ideal candidate understands how content drives demand generation and can translate complex educational offerings into clear, relatable narratives that inspire action.
	Success in this role requires both creativity and discipline; someone who can consistently produce engaging content while also creating moments that capture national attention and drive organic amplification.


Specific Responsibilities
Content Strategy and Copywriting:


	Develop and execute a content strategy that clearly communicates the value of ALX programmes and inspires prospective learners to take action. ? Craft compelling copy for: Social media posts, Marketing campaigns, Landing pages, Community engagement initiatives and Learner and alumni storytelling features 
	Translate complex programme offerings into clear, relatable narratives that resonate with young professionals and aspiring tech learners. Ensure content consistently reinforces ALX Nigeria’s positioning around digital skills, career transformation, and the future of work. 


Content Creation and Mobile Production:


	Produce engaging short-form video content using mobile devices, capturing authentic learner stories, programme highlights, and community experiences. 
	Maintain a consistent pipeline of video testimonials featuring learners, alumni, and instructors that showcase programme outcomes and career transformation. 
	Edit video content using mobile editing tools to enable rapid content production and distribution. 
	Prioritise formats that drive organic reach and engagement, particularly short-form video and authentic storytelling. 
	Maintain a consistent flow of high-quality visual and written content across social platforms. 


Social Media Management:


	Manage ALX Nigeria’s social media presence across key platforms, including LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, X (Twitter), and YouTube 
	Develop and maintain a structured content calendar aligned with marketing campaigns, programme launches, and community initiatives.
	Monitor social media conversations and engage with audiences in ways that strengthen credibility and trust. 
	Ensure consistent messaging, tone, and storytelling across all social platforms. 
	Identify and expand ALX Nigeria’s presence into emerging or underutilised platforms where relevant audiences are active (e.g., Reddit, Pinterest, niche community forums), establishing credibility and meaningful engagement in new digital spaces. 


Campaign Support:


	Collaborate closely with the Performance Marketing Specialist to develop messaging and creative assets that support marketing campaigns. 
	Ensure campaign narratives align with growth objectives and audience needs. 
	Continuously refine messaging based on campaign performance insights and audience feedback. 


Content Production Coordination:


	Work closely with the Video Editor / Graphics Design Associate to produce high-quality visual and video content. 
	Coordinate content production pipelines to ensure a steady flow of creative assets for marketing campaigns and social media. 
	Maintain clear creative briefs and content planning processes to support efficient execution. 


Audience Insights and Content Optimisation:


	Monitor audience engagement and content performance to understand what messaging resonates most strongly with prospective learners. 
	Track and analyse metrics such as: 
	
		Engagement rates 
		Reach and impressions 
	
	
	Follower growth 
	Video completion rates
	Use insights to continuously refine content strategy and storytelling effectiveness. 


Creator Community and Ambassador Networks:


	Build and nurture a community of creators who help tell and amplify the ALX story. This includes engaging: Learners, Alumni, Ambassadors, Community leaders & Student advocates 
	Develop structured creator programmes that encourage consistent storytelling around ALX programmes, learner journeys, and career outcomes. 
	Provide guidance, prompts, and creative direction to help creators produce authentic content aligned with ALX messaging. 
	Design repeatable formats for creator-led storytelling, including: Testimonial videos, Day-in-the-life content, Career transition stories, Programme highlights & Community challenges 
	Encourage learners and alumni to produce authentic content that expands ALX’s visibility through peer-to-peer storytelling. 
	Develop creator-led campaigns that increase organic reach and strengthen community participation. 


High-Impact and Viral Content:


	Create content designed for shareability and organic amplification. ? Identify cultural moments, industry conversations, and social trends where ALX can participate authentically. 
	Experiment with storytelling formats capable of generating high-impact reach and viral engagement. 
	Develop content campaigns that capture attention across Nigeria’s youth, technology, and career communities 


Skill Requirements
Essential:


	5–7 years of experience in content marketing, social media strategy, or digital storytelling
	Strong copywriting ability with a clear and persuasive narrative style 
	Demonstrated experience producing short-form video content 
	Basic graphic design ability using Canva or similar tools. 
	Strong understanding of modern social media platforms and content formats
	Familiarity with the Nigerian social media landscape across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube. 
	Experience with email marketing or CRM-integrated content campaigns.
	Experience creating content that supports marketing and growth objectives
	Ability to combine creativity with strategic thinking 
	Adaptability: Comfort operating in an environment where priorities shift, products evolve, and the playbook is still being written. Someone who finds ambiguity energising rather than paralysing.
	Collaborative Instinct: A natural inclination to share context, loop in the right people, and build on others' work rather than operating in isolation. Especially important in a small team where information hoarding slows everything down. 
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Oconsulting Limited - Our client, is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Copywriter (Agency Experience Required)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(Hybrid)

Description


	Our client is looking to hire a Senior Copywriter with strong agency experience to join a fast-paced digital marketing environment.


Responsibilities


	Lead copy development across digital campaigns (social, web, paid ads, email, etc.)
	Translate brand strategy into clear, compelling, and high-performing copy
	Work closely with account managers, designers, and strategists to deliver integrated campaigns
	Handle multiple client briefs simultaneously without compromising quality
	Contribute to campaign ideation, pitch decks, and brand storytelling
	Ensure consistency in tone, voice, and messaging across all platforms


Requirements


	Proven experience as a copywriter within a marketing / advertising agency
	Strong portfolio showcasing campaign work (not just standalone writing samples)
	Ability to think strategically, not just execute
	Solid understanding of digital marketing and content performance
	Strong attention to detail and ability to meet tight deadlines
	Confidence in presenting ideas internally and to clients


Why this role:


	You&rsquo;ll be working on diverse brands, building impactful campaigns, and operating in a team that values strong thinking and execution.


Salary
Open (Negotiable based on experience).",

Senior Copywriter (Agency Experience Required) Job at Oconsulting Limited




        
    

        
        Oconsulting Limited - Our client, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Copywriter (Agency Experience Required)

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Description


	Our client is looking to hire a Senior Copywriter with strong agency experience to join a fast-paced digital marketing environment.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Lead copy development across digital campaigns (social, web, paid ads, email, etc.)
	Translate brand strategy into clear, compelling, and high-performing copy
	Work closely with account managers, designers, and strategists to deliver integrated campaigns
	Handle multiple client briefs simultaneously without compromising quality
	Contribute to campaign ideation, pitch decks, and brand storytelling
	Ensure consistency in tone, voice, and messaging across all platforms


Requirements


	Proven experience as a copywriter within a marketing / advertising agency
	Strong portfolio showcasing campaign work (not just standalone writing samples)
	Ability to think strategically, not just execute
	Solid understanding of digital marketing and content performance
	Strong attention to detail and ability to meet tight deadlines
	Confidence in presenting ideas internally and to clients


Why this role:


	You’ll be working on diverse brands, building impactful campaigns, and operating in a team that values strong thinking and execution.


Salary
Open (Negotiable based on experience).

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Site Manager (Building blocks and concrete products manufacturing) Demand & Supply Focus",
  "description": "Dortlands is a construction company, dealing in residential and commercial buildings, real estate and concrete products manufacturing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Site Manager (Building blocks and concrete products manufacturing) Demand &amp; Supply Focus

Job Location:&nbsp;Kobape, Abeokuta - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a results-driven Building block and concrete products Manufacturing Site Manager with a s knowledge of demand and supply management.
	The ideal candidate will oversee daily plant operations, ensure efficient production planning, manage raw material supply, and align output with market demand.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage day-to-day operations of the block manufacturing site
	Plan production schedules based on demand forecasts
	Monitor and control supply of raw materials and inventory levels
	Ensure quality standards, safety compliance, and cost efficiency
	Supervise site staff and coordinate logistics for timely delivery
	Analyse demand trends to optimise production and minimise waste


Requirements


	Relevant qualification in Engineering, Construction, or operations management (preferred but not essential)&nbsp;with 0-1 year experience.
	Experience in block/concrete manufacturing or similar industry preferred but not essential as training will be provided.
	Knowledge of supply chain and demand planning. (preferred but not essential.
	Good leadership, organisational, and problem-solving skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet production targets.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV/application to:&nbsp;Adedotun@dortlands.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email

Note:&nbsp;For more information, WhatsApp: +353899408821",

Site Manager (Building blocks and concrete products manufacturing) Demand & Supply Focus Job at Dortlands




        
    

        
        Dortlands is a construction company, dealing in residential and commercial buildings, real estate and concrete products manufacturing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Site Manager (Building blocks and concrete products manufacturing) Demand & Supply Focus

Job Location: Kobape, Abeokuta - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a results-driven Building block and concrete products Manufacturing Site Manager with a s knowledge of demand and supply management.
	The ideal candidate will oversee daily plant operations, ensure efficient production planning, manage raw material supply, and align output with market demand.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage day-to-day operations of the block manufacturing site
	Plan production schedules based on demand forecasts
	Monitor and control supply of raw materials and inventory levels
	Ensure quality standards, safety compliance, and cost efficiency
	Supervise site staff and coordinate logistics for timely delivery
	Analyse demand trends to optimise production and minimise waste


Requirements


	Relevant qualification in Engineering, Construction, or operations management (preferred but not essential) with 0-1 year experience.
	Experience in block/concrete manufacturing or similar industry preferred but not essential as training will be provided.
	Knowledge of supply chain and demand planning. (preferred but not essential.
	Good leadership, organisational, and problem-solving skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet production targets.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV/application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email

Note: For more information, WhatsApp: +353899408821    

    

        Click here to Apply

	Shally Essence Perfumery is seeking experienced and motivated Field Marketing Executives to promote and sell our multipurpose liquid soap across designated locations.

Marketing Executive Job at Shally Essence Scents and Cosmetics




        
    

        
        Shally Essence Scents and Cosmetics is a beauty and fragrance brand dedicated to helping people feel confident, refreshed, and uniquely expressive through premium-quality scents and cosmetic products.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Executive

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Company: Shally Essence Perfumery

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Shally Essence Perfumery is seeking experienced and motivated Field Marketing Executives to promote and sell our multipurpose liquid soap across designated locations.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for engaging customers directly, increasing product awareness, and driving sales growth in assigned areas.


Key Responsibilities


	Promote and sell Shally Essence products to customers in various locations
	Conduct face-to-face marketing in estates, offices, and marketplaces
	Demonstrate product usage and benefits effectively
	Build and maintain strong customer relationships
	Achieve assigned sales goals and contribute to revenue growth
	Provide market feedback and customer insights
	Represent the brand professionally at all times


Requirements


	Minimum qualification: SSCE
	Proven experience in field marketing or direct sales
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and meet goals
	Energetic, confident, and result-driven personality
	Good knowledge of Lekki and surrounding areas.


Salary
N150,000 - N280,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and your picture to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
